Defect remediation batch K.9 closed (52 defects: 36 P0 + 16 P1) using 3-phase parallel batch (Phase 1: sed bulk P0 sweep · Phase 2: Python canonical V/M block injection · Phase 3: per-file gate verify). Total elapsed: ~25 minutes vs. 2-2.5 hr sequential estimate.

_meta.owner: Agent #51 KM + Agent #63 FJA-CDCA + CWO Cherkun
_meta.purpose: SSOT singleton for all canonical facts in ANTS 2.0 workspace. Replaces 15+ hard-coded references scattered across operational files. Pairs with /canonical/canonical-facts.md (human-readable). Per Op Principle 16 (Cross-Doc SSOT Discipline · Pattern A — Centralize).
_meta.update_protocol: Any change to V/M, agent count, ecosystem, op count, or any canonical fact MUST update this file + canonical-facts.md atomically. No edits to consumer files without SSOT update first.
_meta.verification: Run /scripts/vm-canonical-lint.py against any consumer file before commit. Pre-Edit Lint Gate hook blocks save on divergence.

vision_mission.language_policy: English-primary in operational UI (CC, Solutions Stack, dashboards). Thai supporting/gloss text allowed beneath. Founder-story + memory canonicals exempt from English-primary rule.

exempt_paths_reason: Archived files preserve historical state intentionally. Foundational-apr17 are early frozen docs. Launches are event-snapshot artifacts. Founder-story uses different rhetorical conventions. Canonical/scripts are SSOT/tooling themselves. Manifests are append-only audit trails that document historical drift (they MUST contain stale strings as evidence). DAS reports are output of the lint itself. Op12 templates are META about V/M (not rendering them). /docs/ are meta-documentation describing scripts/processes (e.g. friday-push-ritual.md quotes sensitivity-gate patterns intentionally · K.22).
